message:
test(transport): add unit tests for codec and memory transport [bd-368w]

Add 23 new tests across codec.rs and memory.rs covering:

Codec (12 new tests):
- Default/set max_message_size, oversized data rejection
- Buffer compaction after threshold crossing
- UTF-8 message encoding, consecutive newlines
- Clear state reset, Default trait, encode newline suffix
- Notification without id, CodecError From impl

Memory transport (11 new tests):
- Debug format (open/closed states)
- Send response and receive, dropped peer handling
- Builder default, close idempotency
- Message ordering guarantee (10 sequential)
- Cancellation during poll with thread coordination
- create_pair_with_capacity usage

Transport crate codec: 23 tests (up from 11).
Transport crate memory: 23 tests (up from 12).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
